title: ottleya greenei
intro: Ottleya greenei, also known as the Desert Marigold or Fiddletown Marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Ottleya greenei include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ottleya greenei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in poultices and salves to topical applications, such as wound care and skin irritations.
